title: phlegmariurus linifolius
intro: Phlegmariurus linifolius, also known as the grass-leaved polypody, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a perennial fern-like plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Phlegmariurus linifolius include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules.
